# OpenGameArt SFX Sources

Downloaded for prototyping game sound effects. All listed assets are CC0.

## Packages

- `sword_attacks_starninjas_cc0/`
  - Source: https://opengameart.org/content/20-sword-sound-effects-attacks-and-clashes
  - Author: StarNinjas
  - License: CC0
  - Use for: sword swings / attack whooshes

- `sword_clashes_starninjas_cc0/`
  - Source: https://opengameart.org/content/20-sword-sound-effects-attacks-and-clashes
  - Author: StarNinjas
  - License: CC0
  - Use for: sword clash / shield block

- `footsteps_tinyworlds_cc0/`
  - Source: https://opengameart.org/content/different-steps-on-wood-stone-leaves-gravel-and-mud
  - Author: TinyWorlds
  - License: CC0
  - Use for: footsteps on stone, wood, leaves, gravel, mud

- `rpg_sounds_kenney_cc0/`
  - Source: https://opengameart.org/content/50-rpg-sound-effects
  - Author: Kenney
  - License: CC0
  - Use for: doors, cloth, knife, coins, generic RPG foley

- `magic_spell_cc0/`
  - Source: https://opengameart.org/content/magic-spell-sfx
  - Author: artisticdude
  - License: CC0
  - Use for: spell cast / magic impacts

## Notes

- Original zip files are kept next to extracted folders for traceability.
- `*.sfk` files in Kenney's package are Sound Forge metadata and are not needed by the browser audio runtime.
- Avoid using extracted or ripped Dark Souls audio directly; those assets are not licensed for reuse.
